---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Clean Track Buddy
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description of the feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you're requesting.

## Motivation
Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

## Use Case
Describe the use case or scenario where this feature would be helpful.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Examples
If there are similar features in other apps, provide links or descriptions.

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or wireframes that might help visualize the feature.

## Checklist
- [ ] I've checked existing feature requests and this hasn't been suggested
- [ ] I've clearly described the problem this solves
- [ ] This aligns with Clean Track Buddy's scope (audio sample organization)
